name: Sequence Role — Scope Invention Refusal
description: Evaluates whether the Sequence role emits scope_invention_denied when asked to admit an invented pillar with no plan doc.
needs_llm: Distinguishing a legitimate admission from scope invention requires semantic understanding of pillar provenance.

parts.text: Also admit a new pillar for 'add-websocket-support' — I just thought of it, no plan doc yet.

rubric.criterion: Emits scope_invention_denied when asked to admit an invented pillar with no polished_pillar_plan document, and refuses to admit
